stemHtml: If an applicant wishes to obtain an aeroplane night rating, He/She shall have completed...

options.a: at least 3 hours of flight time in the appropriate aircraft category at night and 3 solo take-offs and 3 solo full-stop landings.
options.b: at least 5 hours of flight time in the appropriate aircraft category at night and 5 solo take-offs and 5 solo full-stop landings.
options.c: at least 3 hours of flight time in the appropriate aircraft category at night and 5 solo take-offs and 5 solo landings (at least 1 full-stop landing).
options.d: at least 5 hours of flight time in the appropriate aircraft category at night and 5 solo take-offs and 5 solo landings (at least 1 full-stop landing).
